name: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc.
business: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. engineers, designs, manufactures and sells specialty piping systems and leak detection systems. Its specialty piping systems include insulated district heating and cooling piping, containment piping for chemicals and petroleum, and coating/insulation for oil and gas pipelines. The company also provides anti-corrosion coatings and leak detection systems.

exposures.sentence: the coating and/or insulation of oil and gas gathering and transmission pipelines
insulated and jacketed district heating and cooling piping systems for efficient energy distribution from central energy plants to multiple locations
The Company's leak detection systems are sold with its piping systems or on a stand-alone basis to monitor areas where fluid intrusion may contaminate the environment
primary and secondary containment piping systems for transporting chemicals, hazardous fluids and petroleum products

catalysts.event: Backlog expected to be completed within fiscal year ending January 31, 2027
catalysts.sentence: most of which is expected to be completed within the year ending January 31, 2027

catalysts.event: Scheduled testing of material weaknesses in internal controls in 2026
catalysts.sentence: three material weaknesses remain, which are scheduled for testing in 2026
